name: ExtensionRegulatedAuthorization_StatusDate
title: R5: The date at which the current status was assigned (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `RegulatedAuthorization.statusDate` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`RegulatedAuthorization.statusDate` 0..1 `dateTime`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `RegulatedAuthorization.statusDate` 0..1 `dateTime`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.statusDate` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.statusDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
